zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Robert de Musgrave於1146年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親Peter de Musgrave21歲，母親Mrs. Peter de Musgrave21歲。他於1166年與Matilda de Carvile在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1188年在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德桑德福德享年42歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Robert de Musgrave于1146年出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲Peter de Musgrave21岁，母亲Mrs. Peter de Musgrave21岁。他于1166年与Matilda de Carvile在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1188年在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德桑德福德享年42岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Musgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Musgrove
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Musgrave in Cumbria. The placename derives from Old English mūs ‘mouse’ + grāf ‘copse, grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Robert de Musgrave was born in 1146, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Peter de Musgrave, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. Peter de Musgrave, was 21. He married Matilda de Carvile in 1166, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died in 1188, in Sandford, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Robert de Musgrave est né en 1146, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter de Musgrave, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Peter de Musgrave, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Carvile en 1166, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé en 1188, à Sandford, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Great Musgrave, Westmoreland, England: Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Robert de Musgrave 1146 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter de Musgrave 21 und seine Mutter Mrs. Peter de Musgrave 21. Er hat 1166 in Westmorland, England Matilda de Carvile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb 1188 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Sandford, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert de Musgrave è nato il nel 1146 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Peter de Musgrave, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Peter de Musgrave, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Carvile nel 1166, nel Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1188, nel Sandford, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Robert de Musgraveが1146年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Peter de Musgraveは21歳，母Mrs. Peter de Musgraveは21歳であった。1166年にイギリスウエストモーランドでMatilda de Carvileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1188年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドサンドフォードで42歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert de Musgrave(이)가 1146년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter de Musgrave(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Peter de Musgrave(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1166년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Matilda de Carvile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1188년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 샌드퍼드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert de Musgrave nasceu em 1146, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter de Musgrave, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Peter de Musgrave, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Carvile em 1166, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1188, em Sandford, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Robert de Musgrave родился в 1146 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter de Musgrave было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Peter de Musgrave, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Carvile в 1166 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер в 1188 г. в местности сэндфорд, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Robert de Musgrave nació en 1146, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter de Musgrave, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs. Peter de Musgrave, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Matilda de Carvile en 1166, en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1188, en Sandford, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
